personaCta.h2: Where to start is up to you

business.title: For business
business.text: An AI team for your business: lawyer, marketer, strategist and coach — no subscription, no hiring. Ask a question right now.

creator.title: For content
creator.text: An AI assistant for content: copy, ideas, headlines, SEO. From a post to a script — in minutes.

personal.title: For yourself
personal.text: An AI psychologist and coach, always available. Understand yourself — the first conversation is free.

personaCta.social: 16 AI specialists in one place · conversations about business, content and self-growth

biz.sub: AI assistants handle a founder's tasks: review a contract, estimate taxes, write a post and a strategy, advise on hiring. First tasks are free.

creator.eyebrow: An AI studio for content creators
creator.sub: AI writes posts and scripts, generates images and video for social. Idea → ready content in minutes. The SMM assistant Yulia plans your feed. First pieces are free.

hero.sub: Six AI assistants (marketer, lawyer, accountant, HR, coach and Roman) that write content and grow with your business. One profile for everything.
hero.trust: 🎁 25,000 tokens free · no card · no subscription · 2-minute start
hero.privacy: 🔒 Private — we never share your data with third parties

problem.h2: There aren't enough hours in a day to grow your business

items.title: Busywork eats your focus
items.text: Replying to clients, writing posts, drafting contracts — and suddenly you're not growing, you're firefighting.

items.title: Hiring is slow and expensive
items.text: Marketer, lawyer, HR — that's an extra ₽300–500K/mo in payroll at an early stage.

items.title: Ten tools, one context
items.text: ChatGPT, Notion, CRM, email — each knows a fragment about you, not the whole.

problem.footer: Linkeon puts this in one product: AI assistants do the work, and your profile — the context — lives in one place.

assistants.sub: Each an expert in their role. They remember your business, know about each other, respond by voice or text.

profile.sub: Through your conversations Linkeon builds your profile: values, business, pain points, communication style. Every assistant starts not from zero, but with full understanding.
bullets: Used to find partners by values

networking.h2: Partners and experts who match your values
networking.sub: A profile is not a resume. It's values, intent, style. Linkeon finds people who resonate with you — for partnerships, clients, hires, projects.

cols.title: Partners
cols.text: Co-founders and experts with a similar worldview.

cols.title: Clients
cols.text: Those aligned with your meaning, not just price.

content.h2: Plus visuals and video — in the same tokens
content.sub: Your AI marketer wrote the plan? Generate covers, carousels and short videos right there. No switching between services and subscriptions.

images.caption: Nano Banana, realistic and fast. Covers, carousels, social visuals.

video.caption: Kling 2.1. Short clips from text or image — ad creatives, previews, stories.

content.footer: Runs on the same tokens as assistants. No separate subscriptions.

how.h2: From SMS to first result — 3 minutes

steps.title: SMS sign-in
steps.text: Just your phone number. No card. +25,000 tokens on the house.

steps.title: Talk to an assistant
steps.text: Describe the task by voice or text. Your profile grows on its own.

steps.title: Launch features
steps.text: content, contract — the assistant does it and delivers to chat.

steps.title: Growth
steps.text: Assistants remember context. Every next conversation is better.

useCases.h2: Business models where Linkeon replaces a team

items.title: Small business, no staff
items.text: One person = the whole company. Linkeon = marketing department, accounting, legal, sales.

items.title: Freelancers and solo experts
items.text: You do projects, with 100 small tasks around them (contracts, social, leads). AI takes them off.

items.title: Marketing agencies
items.text: Many clients, few people. AI writes ad copy, generates creatives.
benefits: Video and visuals in one place

pricing.h2: You only pay for tokens. No subscriptions.
pricing.sub: Tokens don't expire. Buy a pack once, use when needed.

trust.gift: 25,000 tokens on the house for new users

faq.h2: What to know before you start

items.q: What are tokens and how are they spent?
items.a: Tokens are the internal currency. They're used for each assistant reply, generated image or second of video. They don't expire.
SMS sign-in, 2 minutes. You start with 25,000 tokens, enough to try every feature.
Yes. Only you have access to your profile. In settings you control what assistants remember.

items.q: Can I cancel a token purchase?
items.a: Unused tokens are refunded upon request to support within 14 days.
Not yet. We're working on it — ping support if you're interested, we'll speed things up.

items.q: How is it different from ChatGPT?
items.a: ChatGPT is one helper. Linkeon is a team of assistants with a shared profile + image and video generation in one bill.

finalCta.h2: Assemble your AI department in 2 minutes
finalCta.sub: SMS sign-in, 25,000 tokens on the house, no card
finalCta.trust: No subscriptions · no card required · tokens don't expire
